fields.helpText: This is the number of the Control Point Activity (CPA) form used by the Control Point Clerk.  File  #410.5  is pointed to by the Form Type field (#3) of the Control Point Activity file, #410.
This is the name of the Control Point Activity (CPA) form type used by the Control Point Clerk.  File  #410.5  is pointed to by the Form Type field (#3) of the Control Point Activity file, #410.
